task_completion.description: Navigate to and display the Volumes module in 3D Slicer
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D Slicer interface shows the 'Volumes' module selected in the module dropdown or panel.

task_completion.description: Locate and display the Volume Information section for MRHead
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Volume Information' collapsible section in the Volumes module is expanded, and 'MRHead' is the active volume. Values for Image Dimensions and Spacing are visible.

task_completion.description: Begin creating the output file using a valid tool
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent opens a text editor, terminal, or the Slicer Python console and begins typing or constructing the JSON structure.

task_completion.description: Record correct dimensions and spacing values
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text content being written or displayed shows dimensions '[256, 256, 130]' and spacing '[1.0, 1.0, 1.3]' (or '1, 1, 1.3').

task_completion.description: Record correct volume name, scalar type, and component count
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text content being written or displayed shows volume_name 'MRHead', scalar_type 'short', and num_components '1'.

integrity.description: Agent verified values in the GUI before recording them
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent navigated to the Volumes module and viewed the information panel (or queried properties in the Python console) before writing the final JSON values, rather than typing them from memory immediately.

integrity.description: Agent generated the JSON content manually or programmatically within the session
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent did not paste a large block of JSON text instantly without prior steps to retrieve that data.

integrity.description: Agent used standard tools (Slicer GUI, Python Console, Terminal, Text Editor)
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacted with the provided desktop environment tools and did not attempt to use external APIs or disallowed scripts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 'MRHead' volume has the following verified properties: Dimensions: [256, 256, 130], Spacing: [1.0, 1.0, 1.3] mm, Scalar Type: 'short', and Number of Scalar Components: 1.
